title: GFDSmooth
description: A resourcepack making the world smooth and simple.
body:
### Making your world smooth and simple! A simplistic resourcepack.
 
# GFDSmooth 简约淡彩
Made by gfdsggafg

## The Idea of the resourcepack
To use less colors and more regular patterns to make the block looks smooth and eye-pleasing. Maybe a little unfriendly to recognize different blocks, but in my opinion, that's receptable considering my idea:-)

## The Survival-Convenience Add-on 生存便捷附加包
Less aesthetic but more convenient in survival mode. Changes include larger transparent area on doors and trapdoors, and highlighted frames on budding amethyst blocks, ore blocks and powdered snow blocks. 

## Now suitable for 1.13-1.19.2 with different versions.
